settings.address: Suite 404, Golden Crest Plaza, High Street, Cityville
settings.aboutText: At Apex Property Consultation, we provide premium guidance for buying, renting, and investing in high-yield properties and premium land plots. Our team handles evaluation, legal verifications, and smooth negotiation so you get the best value.
settings.heroSubtitle: Handpicked villas, apartments, plots, and commercial spaces tailored to your investment goals.
settings.whatsappTemplate: Hello, I am interested in "{title}" (Ref ID: {id}). Could you please share more details?

properties.title: Serene Meadow Premium Villa
properties.description: A luxurious 4 BHK villa located in the prestigious Golden Hills community. Comes with a private infinity pool, a state-of-the-art home theater, manicured lawns, and double-height ceilings. Fully verified title and clean legal history.

properties.title: Modern Skyline Penthouse
properties.description: Stunning 3 BHK penthouse on the 24th floor overlooking the city skyline. Features floor-to-ceiling glass windows, premium Italian marble flooring, automation, and a large terrace. Close to tech parks and premium schools.

properties.title: Prime Gated Community Plot
properties.description: East-facing premium residential plot of 2400 sq.ft in the Green Acres gated development. Broad 40ft blacktop roads, water connection, underground electricity, and clear documentation. Perfect for building your dream home.

properties.title: Commercial Retail / Office Space
properties.description: Prime retail ground-floor showroom space in a high-footfall zone. Includes glass frontage, central air-conditioning provision, double basement parking, and excellent visibility for retail brands or corporate offices.

enquiries.name: Rahul Sharma
enquiries.message: Hi, I would like to schedule a site visit for the Serene Meadow Premium Villa this weekend.
